mapper.select: SELECT t.topic_id, t.forum_id, t.title, t.content, t.user_id, t.last_reply_time, t.view_count, t.reply_count, t.is_pinned, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_time, t.update_time, u.username, u.avatar, f.forum_name FROM comm_discussion_topic t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN comm_discussion_forum f ON t.forum_id = f.forum_id WHERE t.topic_id = #{topicId} AND t.del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comm_discussion_topic SET reply_count = reply_count + #{increment}, last_reply_time = NOW() WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
